title: Japan’s Leader Invokes Her Hero, Shinzo Abe, to Drive Nationalist Agenda
summary_full: Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi is leveraging her ties to Mr. Abe, the slain Japanese leader, as she pushes to reshape defense and the economy.
summary_public: Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi is leveraging her ties to Mr. Abe, the slain Japanese leader, as she pushes to reshape defense and the economy.
